meta.description: Render a low-resolution preview of the Remotion composition for review

step.name: set_low_res_render_config
step.action: Configure the Remotion render settings for a low-resolution preview. Set resolution to 720p (1280x720) regardless of the final target resolution. Set CRF to 28 for smaller file size. Set codec to h264 with fast encoding preset. Disable any computationally expensive effects that are not critical for review. Set concurrency based on available CPU cores (default to 50% of available cores).

step.name: render_via_remotion_cli
step.action: Execute the Remotion render command: npx remotion render {composition-id} {output-path} with the low-res configuration. Monitor render progress and log any warnings or errors. Handle render failures by checking for common issues (missing assets, memory errors, codec problems) and retrying once after fixing. Save the rendered preview to episodes/{episode_id}/exports/preview/preview-{timestamp}.mp4.

step.name: calculate_render_time
step.action: Calculate and report the render duration. Log wall-clock time for the render and estimate time for the full-resolution final render based on the ratio.
step.output: Render duration report with full-resolution estimate

step.name: present_preview
step.action: Present the rendered preview to the user for review. Display the preview file path, duration, resolution, and file size. Provide a summary of what is included in the composition: number of scenes, transitions used, audio tracks, and text overlays. Note any known issues or placeholder elements that will be finalized in the full render.

step.name: approval_gate
step.action: Request explicit approval or rejection of the preview. If approved, mark the composition as ready for final render and update the workflow status. If not approved, collect specific feedback on what needs to change (timing, transitions, audio levels, text placement, visual issues). Document all feedback items as actionable revision tasks. Do not proceed to final render until approval is obtained.

quality-gates.gate: Render configuration set to 720p with fast encoding preset
Preview file saved to exports/preview/ with timestamp
Explicit approval or rejection obtained from reviewer
Rejection feedback documented as actionable revision tasks
